settings.title: AutoFull G7 gaming chair
settings.desktop_price_text: From $49/month, or 3 payments at 0% interest with Klarna

settings.title: Packs powerful performance.
settings.description: In the heat of intense gaming, this chair anticipates your every move. Its self‑adjusting lumbar support actively tracks your waist, cradling your spine’s curve in real time. The 4D headrest and 720° armrests instantly stabilize your neck and arms as you shift, eliminating strain. After victory, the 140° zero‑gravity recline and cloud‑like shock‑absorbing mesh launch you into soft, deep relaxation. Built tough with BIFMA‑level durability tested through 120,000 recline and 600,000 armrest cycles, it’s more than a chair—it’s a dynamic support system engineered for your body and focus, letting you command comfort in every scene.

settings.title: Colors
settings.description: Colors: Available in 4 styles. Featured: Laser, Sakura Pink, White, and Panda.

settings.title: RGB Lighting (Optional)
settings.description: RGB lighting back panel allows you to switch between gaming mode and work mode. Define your setup with dynamic RGB lighting. With sound-reactive sync, the lighting pulses to the rhythm of your environment.

settings.title: Lumbar Support Adjustment
settings.description: 30mm front-to-back lumbar support, 20mm height adjustment, and 40° dual-wing wrap. Adaptive lumbar support for precision comfort in any dynamic posture.

settings.title: Headrest Adjustment
settings.description: Whether leaning in for an attack, sitting upright for a snipe, or reclining to watch, the headrest provides constant, seamless neck support.

settings.title: Armrest Adjustment
settings.description: Armrest Adjustment: Supports 70mm height adjustment, 60mm front-to-back adjustment, 360° surface rotation, 360° handle rotation, and a 4-level flip-up adjustment up to 39°. Perfect arm support for PC gaming, mobile gaming, or resting.

settings.title: 90° to 140°
settings.description: 90° to 140°: Auto-balance mechanism ensures smooth motion regardless of body type. Lean back or sit up effortlessly. Includes 4-level locking for work, media, or napping. Integrated cable-controlled levers allow for height, depth, and recline adjustments without bending over.

settings.title: user friendly
settings.description: Integrated Cable Controls: Easy operation without bending over

settings.title: Immersive Experience
settings.description: Immersive Experience: Fully immerse yourself in a dedicated gaming or professional workspace.

settings.subtitle_pc: Just Lean Back. It Already Knows.
settings.description_pc: The 4D-adjustable headrest tilts, pivots, and adjusts to cradle your head perfectly. We've made it simple: the moment you settle in, support follows—effortlessly, intuitively.

settings.title: 720° Dual-Axis Robotic Armrests
settings.description: 720° omnidirectional adjustable armrests: 70mm height, 60mm front-to-back, dual 360° rotation, and 4-level 39° flip-up for precision support in every posture.

settings.description_pc: True comfort is always in motion.
settings.description_mob: True comfort is always in motion.

settings.title: No More Floating Elbows. Full Support, Full Focus.

settings.popup_description: 70° headrest rotation / 70° folding tilt / 5.5cm front-back / 4.5cm up-down adjustment
2cm vertical slide / 12° adaptive rotation / 3.2cm dual-mode front-back / 7cm height adjustment / 40° wing rotation
70mm height, 60mm front-back slide, 360° armrest surface rotation, 360° armrest handle rotation, 4-position flip lock (forward 1-step 13°, backward 2-step 26°, total 39° flip angle).

settings.title: Healthy Posture, Perfect Fit.
settings.mobile_title: Flexible Ergonomic Fit for Perfect Healthy Posture

settings.title: Cloud Shock-Absorption Mesh
settings.description: Gradient mesh with a stunning, high-aesthetic color way! Infused with anti-UV components, durability and elasticity are enhanced by 56%, while breathability is increased by 16.5%, keeping you fresh at all times.

settings.title: The Recline, Perfected.
settings.description: The backrest intuitively adjusts to your body weight and posture. Lean into it slightly, and it glides smoothly back with just the right resistance. Getting up is just as effortless. Lighter frames enjoy easy recline, while a solid build delivers even more stability. From sitting to leaning back to rising—every move feels natural, intuitive, and entirely your own.

settings.title: Built for Every Style You Play
Master Craftsmanship · Premium Quality
settings.description: Exceeds BIFMA standards, surpassing national requirements. Rigorously tested: 100,000 caster cycles, 120,000 backrest recline cycles, 60,000 armrest cycles, 120,000 gas lift cycles, 120,000 swivel cycles. Backed by a 3-year warranty engineered for reliability, supported with peace of mind.
settings.mob_description:
Strictly adhering to BIFMA international standards, the chair has passed rigorous 10-year simulated lifespan testing for long-lasting reliability. Specific tests include 100,000 caster cycles, 120,000 backrest recline cycles, and 600,000 armrest cycles.
Comprehensive durability testing includes 120,000 gas lift cycles and 120,000 rotation fatigue cycles, ensuring every component is built to last. For after-sales, we provide a 3-year warranty and a special Lifetime Warranty for the AutoFull chair frame, demonstrating our confidence in the quality of the core structure.

settings.description_pc: Universal Silent Wheels: Silent PA+PU casters: Smooth, quiet, and floor-friendly.
settings.description_mob: Universal Silent Wheels: Silent PA+PU casters: Smooth, quiet, and floor-friendly.

settings.description_pc: High-Load Base: Made of industrial-grade steel, rock-solid stability
settings.description_mob: High-Load Base: Made of industrial-grade steel, rock-solid stability

settings.description_pc: Class 4 Gas Lift: Dual SGS/TUV certification, double protection, the highest safety rating.
settings.description_mob: Class 4 Gas Lift: Dual SGS/TUV certification, double protection, the highest safety rating.

settings.title: FAQs
settings.faq_1_question: Is the Hbada E3 good for back pain?
settings.faq_1_answer: Yes. The Hbada E3 is designed with ergonomic lumbar support to help relieve back pain caused by long periods of sitting. It promotes better posture and reduces pressure on the lower back.
